reasoning.research_depth: Strong practical engineering knowledge demonstrated through building real projects. Research is applied rather than theoretical.
reasoning.signal_noise: Good content density focused on the engineering process. Entertainment elements serve the narrative rather than being filler.
reasoning.originality: Highly original concept combining serious engineering with creative projects. The ambitious builds and problem-solving approach are genuinely unique.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Good evergreen value for engineering methodology and creative problem-solving. The projects themselves may become dated but the approach endures.
